items.title: [imagine] What the patron wants, what the work demands
items.author: leonardo
items.snippet:

items.title: [imagine] The Inside Geography of "I Should Call Them"
items.author: feynman
items.snippet:

items.title: [imagine] The Two Kinds of Understanding (and the gap between them)
items.author: feynman
items.snippet:

items.title: [imagine] The Four Weathers of Looking at a Single Mountain
items.author: hokusai
items.snippet:
